title: impl: chat_create_direct, chat_create_group, chat_set_update
description:
What: Implement chat_create_direct, chat_create_group, and chat_set_update methods on JmapChatClient in methods/chat.rs.

Algorithm:
1. Add import: use super::{ChangesResponse, ChatCreateDirectInput, ChatCreateGroupInput, ChatUpdateInput, AddMemberInput, UpdateMemberRoleInput, GetResponse, QueryResponse, QueryChangesResponse, SetResponse};
2. chat_create_direct(&self, session, input: &ChatCreateDirectInput<'_>) -> Result<SetResponse, ClientError>:
   a. let (api_url, account_id) = Self::session_parts(session)?;
   b. Build create_obj: {kind: 'direct', contactId: input.contact_id}
   c. let args = json!({accountId, create: {input.client_id: create_obj}})
   d. build_request("Chat/set", args), call, extract_response
3. chat_create_group(&self, session, input: &ChatCreateGroupInput<'_>) -> Result<SetResponse, ClientError>:
   a. session_parts
   b. Build create_obj: {kind: 'group', name: input.name, memberIds: input.member_ids}
   c. Conditionally insert: description, avatarBlobId, messageExpirySeconds (None = omit)
   d. let args = json!({accountId, create: {input.client_id: create_obj}})
   e. build_request, call, extract_response
4. chat_set_update(&self, session, input: &ChatUpdateInput<'_>) -> Result<SetResponse, ClientError>:
   a. session_parts
   b. let mut patch = serde_json::Map::new()
   c. Conditionally insert each field:
      - muted: Option<bool> → insert if Some
      - mute_until: Option<Option<&UTCDate>> → if Some(inner): insert inner.map(|d| d.as_str().into()).unwrap_or(Null)
      - receive_typing_indicators: Option<bool>
      - pinned_message_ids: Option<&[&str]> → if Some(ids): insert as JSON array
      - message_expiry_seconds: Option<u64>
      - receipt_sharing: Option<bool>
      - name: Option<&str>
      - description: Option<Option<&str>> → same nullable pattern as mute_until
      - avatar_blob_id: Option<Option<&str>>
   d. For add_members (non-empty): build array of {id, role} objects (role: omit if None), insert under 'addMembers'
   e. For remove_members (non-empty): insert ids array under 'removeMembers'
   f. For update_member_roles (non-empty): build array of {id, role}, insert under 'updateMemberRoles'
   g. let args = json!({accountId, update: {input.id: Value::Object(patch)}})
   h. build_request("Chat/set", args), call, extract_response

Defensive programming rules:
- No guard for empty create inputs — each method has a single purpose
- Nullable optional fields (mute_until, description, avatar_blob_id) use the Option<Option<...>> → Null pattern from misc.rs presence_status_set
- For roles in add_members: use serde_json::to_value(role).map_err(ClientError::Serialize)? when Some, omit field when None
- No unwrap(), no key material

Acceptance: cargo test passes, cargo clippy clean, cargo fmt clean
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes; chat_create_direct, chat_create_group, chat_set_update exist on JmapChatClient; clippy and fmt clean
close_reason: chat_create_direct, chat_create_group, chat_set_update implemented in chat.rs
